android.view.ViewGroup.text: & that’s why I love this guy so much, he knows what his priorities are, his wife & sons, he took in his nieces & nephew no questions about it, he’s a man who loves his Mama, & he’s so down to earth, & he’s very generous. Need I go on, Love you bunches Luke
android.view.ViewGroup.content-desc: & that’s why I love this guy so much, he knows what his priorities are, his wife & sons, he took in his nieces & nephew no questions about it, he’s a man who loves his Mama, & he’s so down to earth, & he’s very generous. Need I go on, Love you bunches Luke
